lines.speaker: NARRATOR
lines.text: The chapel is twelve pews and a battery candle. Agnes is already in the third row when Theo pushes the door open. She stays facing forward.

lines.speaker: AGNES
lines.text: Close it behind you.

lines.speaker: NARRATOR
lines.text: He closes the door. The corridor noise seals off. He stands at the back, not yet choosing a seat.

lines.speaker: THEO
lines.text: You can't have heard already.

lines.speaker: AGNES
lines.text: I didn't need to hear. I watched him follow you from the station. I know what that walk means after thirty years in this building.

lines.speaker: NARRATOR
lines.text: Theo comes forward. Sits in the row behind her. The candle throws a thin light that doesn't quite reach the back wall.

lines.speaker: THEO
lines.text: He called it a check-in.

lines.speaker: AGNES
lines.text: They always do.

lines.speaker: THEO
lines.text: Said the diverted ward was under internal review. That asking questions could complicate the timeline. That I should be careful.

lines.speaker: AGNES
lines.text: Careful.

lines.speaker: THEO
lines.text: His exact word.

lines.speaker: NARRATOR
lines.text: A silence. Agnes stays still in her seat.

lines.speaker: AGNES
lines.text: How many times have I heard that word in this building. Careful. Prudent. Patient. Every version of the same instruction: stop. Dressed differently for different people, but the instruction is identical.

lines.speaker: NARRATOR
lines.text: Theo's hands rest flat on his knees.

lines.speaker: THEO
lines.text: Has anyone ever not stopped?

lines.speaker: AGNES
lines.text: A few. Most paid for it in ways that left no paper trail. Rescheduled shifts. A commendation that never arrived. The kind of institutional friction no one can point to but everyone eventually feels.

lines.speaker: NARRATOR
lines.text: She turns — not fully, enough to place him in her peripheral field.

lines.speaker: AGNES
lines.text: What Harte is doing has a shape I recognize. It begins as private concern — for you, for the team, framed carefully enough to look like care. Then it becomes documented concern. Then, if you push forward, you become the problem in the record, not the thing you found.

lines.speaker: THEO
lines.text: Has he done this before?

lines.speaker: AGNES
lines.text: Twice that I know of in this building. Once in 2019. Once before that, before your time. One person left. The other stayed and was reassigned until what they knew had been made irrelevant by delay.

lines.speaker: NARRATOR
lines.text: The candle blinks once. Holds.

lines.speaker: THEO
lines.text: And you think that's what this is.

lines.speaker: AGNES
lines.text: I think Clive Harte is under pressure from somewhere above him, and you are the most efficient solution to that pressure. Which is not the same as being disposable — whatever he needs you to believe tonight.

lines.speaker: NARRATOR
lines.text: Theo looks at the small altar. The plastic light.

lines.speaker: THEO
lines.text: That's a strange thing to find comforting.

lines.speaker: AGNES
lines.text: Most true things are.

lines.speaker: NARRATOR
lines.text: She faces forward again. The chapel holds them both a little longer. Then Theo rises, and the door opens, and the shift comes back in — completely, indifferently, without rest.
